summary: Iteration 17 - Testing new Admin Panel features: Contact Messages Management and Gallery Upload. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for Overview tab (Nových zpráv StatCard), Contact Messages tab (filters, expand, archive, delete), and Gallery tab (upload buttons). All features working as expected.
passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (12/12 passed) ===
Admin login works with password SeknuTo2025!
GET /api/admin/contact returns list of 11 messages
GET /api/admin/contact requires authentication (401)
PATCH /api/admin/contact/{id}/status to 'read' works
PATCH /api/admin/contact/{id}/status to 'archived' works
PATCH /api/admin/contact/{id}/status requires authentication (401)
DELETE /api/admin/contact/{id} requires authentication (401)
DELETE /api/admin/contact/nonexistent-id returns 404
POST /api/admin/gallery/upload requires authentication (401)
POST /api/admin/gallery/upload with valid PNG succeeds, returns URL
POST /api/admin/gallery/upload rejects invalid file type (400)
GET /api/admin/stats returns expected fields
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS ===
Admin login page loads with data-testid selectors
Overview tab shows 'Nových zpráv' StatCard with count (7)
Overview tab shows 'Rychlé akce' with 4 cards including 'Zprávy'
Zprávy quick action card shows badge with new message count
Zprávy tab exists in sidebar (data-testid='admin-tab-contact')
Zprávy tab loads 11 contact messages
Filter buttons (Vše, Nové, Přečtené, Archiv) work correctly
Clicking message expands to show details (name, email, phone, message)
'Odpovědět emailem' button visible in expanded message
'Přečteno' button visible for marking as read
'Smazat' button visible for deleting message
Status badges (Nová, Přečtená, Archivová) display correctly
Galerie tab shows form with 'Přidat projekt Před/Po'
Gallery form has 'Nahrát' (Upload) button for BEFORE image (data-testid='upload-before-btn')
Gallery form has 'Nahrát' (Upload) button for AFTER image (data-testid='upload-after-btn')
Gallery URL inputs still work for direct URL entry
All sidebar tabs visible: Přehled, Zprávy, Poukazů, Kupóny, Objednávky, Galerie, Blog
critical_code_review_comments: Contact messages API properly secured with verify_admin() middleware
Gallery upload validates file type (JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF only)
Gallery upload has 10MB file size limit
Uploaded files served via /uploads/ static mount
Contact messages have proper status flow: new -> read -> archived
Frontend correctly fetches new message count for Overview StatCard
seed_data_creation: 11 contact messages exist in DB (7 new, 4 read/archived)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New admin features fully tested: 1) Contact Messages tab with GET/PATCH/DELETE endpoints and UI filters/actions, 2) Gallery Upload with POST /api/admin/gallery/upload endpoint and 'Nahrát' buttons in UI. All endpoints require X-Admin-Token authentication. Rate limiting on admin login (5/min) - use cached token in tests.

mocked_apis.note: Google Calendar and Resend emails are mocked/not fully configured. Core admin functionality works.

admin_contact_messages.GET_list: Returns array of messages with id, name, email, phone, message, status, created_at

admin_gallery_upload.POST_upload: Accepts multipart/form-data with file, returns {url, filename}
admin_gallery_upload.file_validation: Only allows image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, image/gif

overview_new_messages.stat_card: 'Nových zpráv' StatCard shows count of messages with status='new'
overview_new_messages.quick_action: 'Zprávy' quick action card with badge showing new count
